chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-4596 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Misc. No.20376/2024. 2. For orders on Misc. No.20377/2024. 3. For hearing of main case. 23.09.2024. Mr. Ali Zaman Khan Tanoli, Advocate for the Petitioner. ----- The Petitioner has invoked the jurisdiction of this Court under Article 199 of the Constitution, praying for the extension of the period of a 2-year Fixed Term Agreement entered into between him and the Pakistan State Oil Company Limited on 01.09.2022. On query posed to learned counsel for the Petitioner, as to what law, rule, regulation or policy conferred such right of extension, no cogent response was forthcoming. Indeed, the grounds pleaded in the Memo of Petition fail to shed any light in that regard. Under the circumstances, where the relationship between the Petitioner and the aforementioned Company is purely contractual in nature, with their mutual rights and obligations being circumscribed accordingly, the matter does not admit to the issuance of a writ. That being so, while granting the application for urgency, we hereby dismiss the Petition in limine, along with the other miscellaneous application. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
